programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 少康战情室
programme.desc: 节目内容包含时事评论与当天的突发新闻议题，以赵少康为主持的政论节目。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: 食尚玩家
programme.desc: 美食旅游节目「食尚玩家」带你走遍台湾与世界各地，寻找在地美食，体验最道地的旅游行程。

programme.title: 整点新闻
programme.desc: 本新闻时段除了在第一时间为观众提供深入的直击报导外，还提供详细的世界头条新闻、两岸三地要闻、台湾焦点新闻，让您的新闻信息零时差。

programme.title: 地球黄金线

programme.title: 最前线新闻
programme.desc: 报导每日全球与当地重大新闻。

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 食尚玩家: 我们这一家
programme.desc: 《我们这一家》以三世代同游同食为主轴，走访在地美食，透过不同价值观的碰撞与理解，用吃喝玩乐串起世代故事

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: Bug Hotel
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: I Like Tractors
programme.desc: From riding cows to having pigs in the house, the funny animals chat about everything brilliant about farms.

programme.title: It's time for a race
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: The Cheese Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: The Tree Badge
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.title: Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Chinese New Year, Dragon Dance Drama
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: Join In
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have their favourite things and The Noo-Noo wants to join in. When the Tubby Phone rings, the Teletubbies and The Noo-Noo do the Tubby Phone Dance together.

programme.title: Van
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'van' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different vans - a yellow van, a white van, a big van and even a veggie van.

programme.title: Hiccups
programme.desc: Messy's hiccups cause a landslide while he is out on a nature walk. Will he be able to find his way home? And will he ever stop hiccupping?

programme.title: Mojo Drop the Ball
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Pirate Peril, Jamaica
programme.desc: Xuli dives into action when Glitch's pirate game puts Lars in danger. Yo-ho Go Jetters go!

programme.title: Horsey Ride
programme.desc: When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

programme.title: Charades
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: Andy and the Shoebill Chick
programme.desc: Andy heads to Southern Africa to discover how shoebill chicks drink water.

programme.title: Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: The Brave Banana Badge
programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.title: The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Volcanic Island
programme.desc: There's trouble erupting for the Go Jetters as Glitch disturbs an underwater volcano...

programme.title: Solar E-Glitch
programme.desc: After watching a solar eclipse, the team head into space to fix the biggest glitch yet!

programme.title: James the Super Engine
programme.desc: When James hears the children of Sodor talking about their latest comic book superhero, he imagines that he too can become a hero.

programme.title: Toggle Tangle
programme.desc: After Sarah helps Scarf Lady prepare the wool for her new roof, she settles down for a dreamy sleep.

programme.title: Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: First Aid
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: Bug Hotel
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Penguins Live in Igloos
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: It's time to build a sandcastle
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran go on a day-trip to the seaside to build a big sandcastle for Panda. But JoJo learns that things need not last forever to be special!

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: The Radio Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.title: Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Penguins Live in Igloos
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: It's time to build a sandcastle
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran go on a day-trip to the seaside to build a big sandcastle for Panda. But JoJo learns that things need not last forever to be special!

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: The Radio Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.title: The Cheese Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Holi Festival of Colour, India
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
programme.desc: Alyssa and Steven moved in together when Alyssa was an impressionable teen. After they have a daughter of their own, their path takes a dark turn when Steven becomes physically abusive toward the infant.

programme.title: Dawn and Carey
programme.desc: Dawn met Carey while working on the West Coast, where they started their family. Now that Carey has retired, Dawn has convinced him to move back home with her to the East Coast.

programme.title: Red Wine Beef Stew Over Polenta
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.

programme.title: Chicken Flautas
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make her version of Mexican flautas using rotisserie chicken, green chillis and a blend of three cheeses, all rolled up and fried in tortillas.
Curtis Stone is back and today's challenge is to combine two nations' cuisines into a tasty dish, with a standout sauce. The winning sauce will be available in Coles stores around the country.
Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: Junkyard Gem
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca score a lead on an unlisted property located in a sought-after neighbourhood in Austin. However, excitement soon turns to panic when they discover that the entire house is a junkyard.

programme.title: White Bean Soup with Albanian Snacks and Baklava
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder 101
programme.desc: Gabbi's luck hits a snag after reuniting with Charles David, Dean of Criminology at Williams College. She's there as a guest lecturer, but when Charles is found dead next morning an investigation begins.
From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: Farmhouse Flipping Fiasco

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 活泼开朗的蓟彩芝(钟嘉欣)从仙草化身的母亲身上得到仙气，变成半仙之体。石敢当(陈浩民)年幼时常被其他小童欺负，后得黄大仙怜悯，赐予九牛二虎之力。晏喜(陈锦鸿)的先祖受了懒虫诅咒，经常无故入睡。一次，喜意外被干将(欧锦棠)神灵附在身上，从此用剑如神。_x000D__x000D_芝、当、喜叁位好友，各自拥有上天赐予的神力，誓要合力消灭危害苍生的无极天尊(谭小环)，最终他们能否取得成功？

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.desc: While Hana investigates a murder at Heathrow, a threat is made against Delaney's jet.

programme.title: Shuck Everlasting
programme.desc: While Donovan tracks a marine smuggling operation, the team investigates the night of a wedding to uncover why the best man ended up at the bottom of the Atlantic.

programme.title: They May Get Their Wish
programme.desc: When a televangelist on the most wanted list surfaces, the Fly Team's attempts to take him down.

programme.title: The Truth Is Outback
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy pilot goes missing at a UFO hotspot in the Outback after being chased by blinding lights, the team must discover if the truth is really "out there."

programme.title: Hurry Up Tomorrow
programme.desc: A musician plagued by insomnia is pulled into an odyssey with a stranger who begins to unravel the very core of his existence.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ketemu di Mimpi is Level 34 of Kangen
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start after a breakup, Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) joins an 'open trip' where she meets Yudha (Rizky Nazar), the charming group leader. They share a romantic night stargazing in the forest, but Saskia wakes up in a hospital with a shock: the travel agency claims they have no record of anyone named Yudha

programme.title: Konser Luar Biasa 2gether 4ever
programme.desc: Dangdut legends like Nita Thalia, Rita Sugiarto, Jihan Audy, and Tasya Rosmala come together for the '2 Gether 4Ever' concert. This star-studded event celebrates Indosiar's 24th Anniversary, delivering spectacular performances for fans both in the studio and at home.

programme.title: GAK GITU KONSEPNYA MAEMUNAH
programme.desc: Maya’s (formerly Maemunah) arrogance leads to a bizarre curse: she suddenly reeks of salted fish, threatening to end her singing career! In a twist of fate, she meets Darto, a handsome salted-fish vendor. Could their meeting be the key to breaking the smelly curse and saving her voice?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maunya Jadian Sama Kamu Tapi Takut Dosa
programme.desc: Rosi (Rayna Snova) and Vino (Jeff Smith) broke up after Rosi’s mother accepted a bribe from Vino’s family to stay away. Years later, Vino is working as a 'ghost' in a night market haunted house. Unaware of the man behind the mask, Rosi pours her heart out to the 'ghost,' crying about how her ex cheated on her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: FOTOGRAFER MUNDURAN DONG TAMPANNYA NIKUNG
programme.desc: Surti and Rudi’s first meeting is an absolute disaster. However, as they are forced to spend more time together, Surti wonders if her genuine sincerity is enough to turn their mutual annoyance into something meaningful.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: IM ADDICTED TO NENG NASI UDUK CANS
programme.desc: After a rebellious escape from his restrictive life, Gibran crosses paths with Suci, a humble girl who sells nasi uduk. Determined to change his ways, Gibran sets out on a mission to win her heart and prove he is her dream match.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34M Followers
programme.desc: During a chaotic fight, Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) and El (Cinta Brian) accidentally knock Tristan (Kevin Hillers) unconscious. Panicking and thinking he’s dead, they plan to hide the 'body' to avoid jail. But just as they are about to dump him, Tristan wakes up! Instead of being angry, Tristan who was bored with his daily routine is thrilled by the adventure and asks them to take him on a vacation.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Sok Petantang Petenteng Eh Malah Cut Off Sampai Asing
programme.desc: Senja (Dosma Hazenbosch) and Irina (Amanda Khairunnisa) were walking around campus. They happened to pass by the Mapala room. There was Bara (Jihad Alfurqon), the Mapala leader who was liked by many female students on campus. Sure enough, Senja immediately fell in love the first time she saw Bara. Because she was so fascinated by Bara, Senja tripped and fell on Langit (Farhan Rasyid) who happened to be sitting there.

programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug and had to pay for 3 portions of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) geprek chicken. Ojan's debt was because Nadia asked him to fix her motorbike which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also just found out that the girlfriend Ojan wanted to meet was cheating on him with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.title: Kabur Aja Dulu Daripada Jadi Baper Mulu
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Ratu (Djihan Ranti). Ratu has a lover named Fathan. Unbeknownst to Ratu, Fathan is secretly having an affair with Ratu's best friend. One day, Ratu is shocked to discover that Fathan has cheated on her and proposed to Ratu's best friend. This leaves Ratu shocked and heartbroken.

programme.title: Neng Urut Senyummu Emang Paling Kyut
programme.desc: Bondan was fired from his job. On his way home, Bondan was riding his motorcycle in a daze until he fell off. When he got home, his mother asked him to get a massage. While Bondan was sleeping, Seruni secretly massaged his feet.

programme.desc: A group of teenagers accidentally hit a man and now are stalked by a serial killer.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: In the second of the blockbuster Batman films, the physically deformed criminal genius The Penguin threatens Gotham City. Helpless, the entire city can only pray that Batman Returns.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.title: Justice League: Crisis On Infinite Earths - Part One
programme.desc: Death is coming. But what can the combined might of Superman, Wonder Woman, Batman, and hundreds of heroes do to save all reality from ARMAGEDDON?!

programme.title: Cobra
programme.desc: When a woman becomes the target of a group of assassins, her only hope is a renegade cop by the name of Cobra.

programme.title: Life Support
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Life Support tells the tale of an HIV-positive woman who learns lessons of love and strength through helping others.

programme.title: Too Big To Fail
programme.desc: A film on the 2008 Wall Street financial crisis that explores the inner sanctum of the powerful group that decided the fate of the world's economy.

programme.title: Journey To The Center Of The Earth
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave, a trio's only hope of escape is to go deep into the center of the Earth as they race against a volcanic eruption to reach the surface.

programme.title: Head Of State
programme.desc: Chris Rock stars in this hilarious political comedy, as he finds himself plucked from obscurity and running for President of the United States!

programme.title: 15 Minutes
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and Edward Burns team up to stop a group of Eastern European murderers who intend to use the media to sensationalize their murders.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Three neighbors uncover a hidden fortune in stolen art only to become trapped in a sadistic game of survival set by a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: #Pilot
programme.desc: Sam and Cat first meet when a wild dilemma lands them in the back of a moving garbage truck. After quickly becoming friends and roommates, they babysit three kids, which give them the idea to start their own babysitting service.

programme.title: The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: Get Rod
programme.desc: No one likes Rod, especially the Turtles! Bishop's former intern keeps trying to kidnap them and steal their mutant blood, but when Rod himself is kidnapped... Mikey is on the case! His first suspect: the mutant-hating Mechazoid maker BISHOP.

programme.title: PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Get Shirty / This Solves Nothing
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide to trick feuding magicians "Shouty Shirt & Abrakapants" into doing their act one last time. // Diamondo is holding a mystery dinner party, but Best and Bester solve a real mystery that is not part of the game.

programme.title: Rock-a-Bye Besty / Shake or Break
programme.desc: Best is too anxious to sleep, but Bester knows what to do. He needs to count sheep! Or count one sheep to be exact. // The twins help Flip Flop with her milkshake deliveries, but find one very difficult customer impossible to satisfy.

programme.title: Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: Late for Breakfast / Bummer Jobs
programme.desc: Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast. // Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

programme.title: Goofy Scoopers / Pat the Dog
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fires robot band from Goofy Goober's. // Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: Lost and Found
programme.desc: When Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost... in the lost & found!

programme.title: From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: Wedding of the Trentury
programme.desc: Captain Man & Danger Force offer to host the ultimate wedding for Swellview's beloved newscaster Trent Overunder and his online girlfriend Tracy426. When they suspect Tracy426 isn't who she claims to be, their meddling threatens to ruin the big day.

programme.title: Jasper's Real Girlfriend
programme.desc: Jasper's summer camp girlfriend comes to town staying with Charlotte. She quickly becomes jealous thinking Charlotte is in love with Jasper. Charlotte begins to question the girl's sanity.

programme.title: My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: A Star is Scorned / Senior Moment
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: Sunset Canyon is falling apart and Lincoln and Clyde High Crimes are determined to find out why... David Steele style.

programme.title: Heart of Garbage / Near-Mint Plankton
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick must search for Squidward after the inside of his home turns into a vast garbage jungle. // In his latest scheme, Plankton disguises himself as a collectible figurine and winds up trapped in Bubble Bass' basement.

programme.title: Pardon My Wand / Stupor-stition
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes. // On Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

programme.title: Delivery of Doom
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: The Haunting of Flim Flam House / Rube Tube
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina help the Flim-Flam brothers hunt the ghost that haunts their house. // On her day off from the Patrick Show, Squidina helps Rube produce his TV show.

programme.title: Zoo U
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo.

programme.title: Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: Europe Road Trip: A Bite of Transylvania / Europe Road Trip: Greece is the Word
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle. // During a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln puts on a soldier's helmet which sends him back to Ancient Greece.

programme.title: Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the cafe using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to room with Patrick, but his domineering demeanor rubs off on Patrick more than he'd like.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Student of the Jeer
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet.

programme.title: My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals.

programme.title: Good Sports / Geri-antics
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. // When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: Dine and Bash
programme.desc: After failing to make Chef Guy Grazer a meal on his show, the kids try to erase the footage before it airs.

programme.title: LAD / Before 10AM

programme.title: Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: iMake Sam Girlier

programme.desc: When Lay Lay and Sadie see Cobo with a cool pet snake, they decide it's time for the Alexander family to adopt a unique pet of their own. Lay Lay discovers the perfect furry companion: a wild possum she discovers she's allergic to!

programme.title: Future Tense / Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.desc: The sisters enlist the "Master of Convincing" (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 棠缘想离开时被翼无忧拦下，后者发现了她的真实身份。同时，土伯一族被杀害，叶凌霜怀疑此事与翼无忧有关，质问他是否与樊如晦勾结。另一方面，彧修明生病，叶凌霜得知他因救自己而耗尽神力，心生愧疚，最终用自己的血救治了彧修明。彧修明恢复后向叶凌霜表白，打算娶她为君后。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】孝棠的孙儿接受心脏手术在即，成败关系到一妍的去留。然而，一妍的腕管综合症加剧，右手连拿餐具都没力。方欣试图阻止一妍的手术，但碍于病人已开刀，一妍拒绝，手痛却令一妍无法拿稳手术刀……以珈意外发现一妍的手腕病情属实，担心会影响海淳的手术，但一妍保证不会有问题！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月向记者彭英杰查询卓家历史，英杰尝试从旧资料入手，调查当年高跟鞋的主人。成风告诉满月，玉玲的女儿范美宝其实未死，满月要接近美宝查出当年下迷药一事。满月发现美宝智商只像十岁，被玉玲禁止接触美宝，其后满月替美宝找回心爱的公仔，玉玲才愿意与满月对话……慧云查到昊天助手霍建堃与世祺合作的事，有所盘算。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 逍遥

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦和翼无忧密谋刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，彧修明将城门大开，与民同庆，以此引出刺客。翼无忧准备借此机会刺杀彧修明，而樊如晦则派雇佣兵控制禁军以协助刺杀。同时，阿夙作为秘术师也参与其中，但在行动中被风隐发现，最终风隐被阿夙和青夙联手杀死。另一方面，棠缘离开了樊平，留下了她的孩子和一封信与樊平决别。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.desc: As rebels resurface, San reels from his brother's betrayal, drawing Deok Im into his turmoil.

programme.title: Miraculous Brothers
programme.desc: Dong Ju warns Kang San of the repercussion once the video tape is made public. During a TV interview, Dong Ju broadcasts the 1995 assault and murder.

programme.title: Jang Bo Ri Is Here
programme.desc: Jae Hee finds out about Min Jung's past. Min Jung calls In Hwa to meet Jong Ha on Bo Ri's wedding day.

programme.title: The Great Queen Seondeok
programme.desc: As Bi Dam tries to fix the final match of Bijae, Chil Sook gets furious and claims to test Yu Shin himself in a match.

programme.title: Partners For Justice 2
programme.desc: Do Ji Han heads to Beolgyo to chase Jang Cheol, while Eun Sol is stunned by the fish post-mortem results.

programme.title: Desperate Mrs. Seonju
programme.desc: Man Eun and Soon Ae have a quarrel, Joong Bae apologises to Seon Ju, and Sang Ah returns her ring to Nam Jin.

programme.title: Taxi Driver 3
programme.desc: Passing Samheungdo's test, Do Gi gets expert advice as the team fakes infighting to deceive the gang.

programme.title: Jang Bo Ri Is Here
programme.desc: Jae Hee finds out about Min Jung's past. Min Jung calls In Hwa to meet Jong Ha on Bo Ri's wedding day.

programme.title: The Red Sleeve
programme.desc: After Royal Consort Won's death, Deok Ro spirals, while Deok Im searches for Gyeong Hui under San's watch.

programme.title: Taxi Driver 3
programme.desc: Haunted by news of Sergeant Yoo's death, Do Gi reenlists in the army and vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Connection
programme.desc: A crime thriller depicting an ace detective who digs up an unsolved case of his high school friend who died leaving a huge sum of insurance money.

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: The must watch for K-Variety shows! In this "urban action variety", the hosts complete a series of obstacles and aim to eliminate each other to win.

programme.title: Cities
programme.desc: Guangdong is China's most developed province, but wildlife continues to thrive alongside its people; myriads of pollinators, rare orchids, snakes, and Chinese Crocodile lizards.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul (S1)
programme.desc: In Paris, Sue samples insects and absinthe, models for Paris Fashion Week, and crashes a cabaret.

programme.title: Facing The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Cyril faces snapping turtles, invasive jumping carp, and dangerous gators while hunting a 200-pound alligator gar in the perilous waters of Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: Motorway
programme.desc: Our 2300 miles of motorway are the backbone of the country and without them, we'd probably all grind to a halt. Hannah takes a drive to the National Highways control centre for the UK's busiest motorway to meet the team that keep these super-roads running 24/7.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.desc: Reza ventures into an unexplored canyon in Saudi Arabia, searching for clues of lost civilizations.

programme.desc: Sookie hatches a dangerous plan; Pam looks to motivate Eric.

programme.desc: A woman crippled by grief must rally to protect herself and her children from the grasp of the woman who simply won’t leave them alone.

programme.desc: A royal visit from the King and Queen of England unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue that leave the future of Downton hanging in the balance.

programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.desc: Jason Bourne must hunt down his past in order to find a future in this third film of the explosive Bourne franchise.

programme.desc: An HBO Original film that looks at Muhammad Ali's historic Supreme Court battle from behind closed doors.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: Birds Of Prey (And The Fantabulous Emancipation Of One Harley Quinn)
programme.desc: Margot Robbie reprises her role as Harley Quinn in a tale as twisted as Harley herself, and told as only Harley can tell it.

programme.title: Falling Star
programme.desc: Investigate the mysterious murders that intersect the world of Playboy.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Twin brothers return to their hometown to discover that evil is waiting for them.

programme.title: Death Is Not The End
programme.desc: Sookie enlists a band of vampires and humans to track down the H-Vamps.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: HUMANE takes place over a single day, mere months after a global ecological collapse has forced world leaders to reduce the earth’s population.

programme.title: Nixon By Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: This HBO Documentary shows the many sides of former president Richard Nixon, through his self-recorded private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 棠缘想离开时被翼无忧拦下，后者发现了她的真实身份。同时，土伯一族被杀害，叶凌霜怀疑此事与翼无忧有关，质问他是否与樊如晦勾结。另一方面，彧修明生病，叶凌霜得知他因救自己而耗尽神力，心生愧疚，最终用自己的血救治了彧修明。彧修明恢复后向叶凌霜表白，打算娶她为君后。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】孝棠的孙儿接受心脏手术在即，成败关系到一妍的去留。然而，一妍的腕管综合症加剧，右手连拿餐具都没力。方欣试图阻止一妍的手术，但碍于病人已开刀，一妍拒绝，手痛却令一妍无法拿稳手术刀……以珈意外发现一妍的手腕病情属实，担心会影响海淳的手术，但一妍保证不会有问题！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月向记者彭英杰查询卓家历史，英杰尝试从旧资料入手，调查当年高跟鞋的主人。成风告诉满月，玉玲的女儿范美宝其实未死，满月要接近美宝查出当年下迷药一事。满月发现美宝智商只像十岁，被玉玲禁止接触美宝，其后满月替美宝找回心爱的公仔，玉玲才愿意与满月对话……慧云查到昊天助手霍建堃与世祺合作的事，有所盘算。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍接到以珈通知后赶回香港，应对方欣展开的挖角潮。一妍尝试加薪挽留不果，多达一百名医护辞职，当中还包括建邦。启澄对于被建邦背叛感震惊，二人闹翻。永成担心明塱一旦倒闭，自己的投资等于泡汤。秀琳决定改由以珈担任代主席。以珈偶然得知马来西亚医疗中心的主要投资人涉及商业诈骗，直觉是扭转局面的关键。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 樊如晦和翼无忧密谋刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，彧修明将城门大开，与民同庆，以此引出刺客。翼无忧准备借此机会刺杀彧修明，而樊如晦则派雇佣兵控制禁军以协助刺杀。同时，阿夙作为秘术师也参与其中，但在行动中被风隐发现，最终风隐被阿夙和青夙联手杀死。另一方面，棠缘离开了樊平，留下了她的孩子和一封信与樊平决别。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 台风的新娘
programme.desc: 虽然殷瑞妍并不富有，但大家都知道她有一颗温暖的心。 有一天，她发现自己一直称为父亲的姜白山，居然是自己亲生父母的仇敌。 殷瑞妍的复仇行动渐渐开始展开……

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 昊天揭破建堃跟世祺等人合谋对付他，怒不可遏。满月收到消息指美宝被昊天捉走，找成风共襄对策，想查出昊天正在哪间医院，却一时未有所获。美宝获释回来，未被抽取骨髓。王卓代主席召开记招，称昊天病重入院后将公司暂托其打理，及后还在董事会上安排众人即席与昊天视像通话……满月成功进入医院找到昊天，却发现昊天中风，无法带他离开。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明坚持大开城门引出刺客，翼无忧和阿夙等人计划刺杀彧修明。在大婚之日，翼无忧冲进皇宫，与彧修明展开生死对决，但被彧修明打败身死。同时，樊如晦的叛乱也被平定，其最终自杀身亡。彧修明和叶凌霜成婚后共同执掌朝政，修建运河，发展经济，为百姓谋求福祉。最终，彧修明的儿子继承皇位，九州大陆迎来了统一与和谐。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
programme.desc: Seher, a young girl in Lucknow, is determined to become a doctor. Her mother, Kausar, supports her dream, while her father's plans for marriage spark conflict.

programme.title: Dr. Aarambhi
programme.desc: Once an AIPMT topper, Aarambhi's life is now weighed down by marital duties, but deep within her lies a long-lost dream. Will she get a second chance?

programme.title: Mangal Lakshmi
programme.desc: Mangal embarks on a quest to find Lakshmi the perfect husband, showcasing the enduring strength of sisterhood, love, trials, and the power of destiny.

programme.title: Do Duniya Ek Dil
programme.desc: Shivaay bravely fights off goons to protect a life-saving injection for Aadhya. Days later, when Aadhya regains consciousness, Baldev is filled with guilt for the harm he caused her.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hanuman
programme.desc: Hanuman returns from Patal Loka and faces a mighty test as Ravan strikes with a deadly blow, unleashing astral demon heads that threaten the night.

programme.title: Mahadev & Sons
programme.desc: Mahadev and his sons win the Best Parivaar award, but Bhanu insults Mahadev and Rajji before the ceremony, leaving Rajji hurt.

programme.title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di
programme.desc: Another portrayal of the same heartfelt love journey, highlighting charm, humor, and the small emotional conflicts that slowly build into meaningful relationships.

programme.title: 金衣大侠
programme.desc: 故事讲述女侠俞飞霞，被武林盟主误会她是运用「黑沙掌」，偷去神功宝书的蒙面少女。于是她女扮男装，混入少林寺暗中查探真相...

programme.title: 狂恋诗
programme.desc: 大伟和小春是同胞兄弟，一个放浪，一个含蓄。小春在舞会邂逅女子珠迪，情心一片。大伟发现珠迪有个年老丈夫，得知此秘密，大伟以此威胁，迫珠迪和他幽会，自始珠迪周旋三个男人之间... 导演以女性角度大胆描写男女情关，手法细腻，而结局亦出人意表。

programme.title: 双凤奇缘
programme.desc: 秦凤笙、凤箫兄妹才情敏捷，满腹经纶，却常受继母夏氏刻薄。凤箫自幼许与李如龙为妻，夏氏贪图富贵，强逼如龙退婚；如龙不肯，夏氏再施毒计诬告如龙偷盗，将其收在狱中。凤箫为救如龙，与侍婢春兰乔扮男装上京，更以如龙之名赴考，一举中恩科状元。明世宗见凤箫长得一表非凡，乃命相国为媒，招为驸马。洞房之夕，凤箫向公主言明真相，并说服公主，安排一条妙计...

programme.title: 南北少林
programme.desc: 智明在北少林习武，司马燕则在南少林习武，两人分别为报杀父之仇而合力行刺贪官，引发激战连场!

programme.title: 菁菁
programme.desc: 故事讲述茶居老板女菁菁与伐木工罗贵生相恋，菁父闻说恶霸看中菁，忙找生筹备婚事；不料翌日生即奉命运送木材进城，只得与菁暂别。生进城后，镇上即有谣言，说生已在城里另订亲事；另一方面菁无意中发现恶霸向寡妇施暴，寡妇不甘受辱自杀，恶霸欲杀人灭口，菁身陷险境。

programme.title: 警察
programme.desc: 梁观偕同情侣沈燕，在郊外游玩谈心时，不幸遇上歹徒劫财色，梁护花不成更惨遭毒手。梁之挚友黄国栋报仇心切，遂毅然投身警界，期有机会亲自侦缉凶手。五年后，黄因出众表现被升职之余，亦与沈日久生情；不久，因一宗离奇的谋杀案件，沈认出当年杀害梁的凶手......

programme.title: 紫贝壳
programme.desc: 许佩青和夏梦轩在宴会相识，因彼此同样经历不幸的婚姻，两人更一见留情。夏梦轩在一次海滩漫步，拾起紫贝壳给佩青留念。许佩青丈夫发现二人关系后，故意伤害她，使她病体支离，同时又勒索夏梦轩。这段爱情故事最后将如何收场？

programme.title: 黄飞鸿
programme.desc: 一代宗师黄飞鸿在广东教授功夫，却被一名恶毒土匪陷害黄飞鸿的弟子，更以抢劫及谋杀等罪行诬陷他。因此，黄飞鸿誓要与土匪对抗力证自己的清白，并为弟子报仇。

programme.title: 错点鸳鸯
programme.desc: 任职推销员的余小宝失恋后，遇上刚刚跟男友分手的富家女金金。二人同病相怜，很快便坠入爱河并闪电结婚，开展甜蜜的生活。可惜，此时金金却发现自己怀上了前男友的骨肉...

programme.title: 玉罗刹
programme.desc: 故事描述，每逢恐怖歌声出现，必有阎家的人被署名「玉罗刹」者所杀。由于「玉罗刹」神出鬼没，闹得满城风雨。冷秋寒于酒馆遇见徐英豪，交谈下，知彼也为寻仇而来；冷直告自己实为「玉罗刹」，杀阎家为替全家报仇，徐劝其勿滥杀无辜，冷不听...

programme.title: 何日君再来
programme.desc: 富家子卓明不顾父亲反对，与歌女雪玲结婚，并因此与家庭断绝关系。婚后，雪玲怀孕，卓明因过度劳累导致视力衰退。为维持家计，雪玲重操旧业登台演唱，而卓明不愿拖累妻子，选择悄然离开。在友人鼓励下，雪玲再次公开献唱，卓明深受感动，最终与妻儿重逢。

programme.title: 侠客行
programme.desc: 路人甲狗杂种走火入魔失去记忆后, 被误认为帮主。原来帮主名为石中玉和他长成一样, 是雪山派的劣徒后逃跑了。后来石中玉终于出现了......

programme.title: 披荆斩棘3
programme.desc: 本季节目以"奋进"为内核，不仅延续了前两季的全景竞演综艺模式，还通过赛制、环节等方面的升级再度强化节目的竞技性。嘉宾们不断挑战、探索，展现男性的奋斗精神和个性魅力。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鹤棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山景, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾
programme.desc: 《世界第一等：菲律宾》带领观众走进充满热情与色彩的菲律宾，探索当地独特的文化、美食与人文风情。从火山地貌到街头美食，从传统疗法到社区故事，节目以轻松幽默的方式呈现菲律宾多元又迷人的面貌。

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Pups Save a Stinky Flower / Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. // Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the Paw Patrol.

programme.title: Pups Save the Polar Bears / A Pup in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must fly to the Arctic in the Air Patroller to rescue the lost cubs. // When little lambs keep running away from Farmer Al's pasture, it's up to the Paw Patrol to find the missing sheep.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Daisy and Poppy / Queen Thistle's Teapot
programme.desc: Holly's little sisters, Daisy and Poppy, borrow a wand, escape from the castle and turn the whole kingdom into bunny rabbits and frogs. // Queen Thistle has a beautiful new teapot. Holly accidentally breaks it and tries to fix it with Ben's help.

programme.title: Ball
programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.title: Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: The Treat Thief
programme.desc: Officer Blaze just got his biggest case yet: tracking down the mischievous Treat Thief! With help from Officer Anna, Blaze sets out to stop the thief and recover every stolen treat!

programme.title: Stuck On You / Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: The Weather Machine
programme.desc: It's race day in Axle City, but Crusher has stolen Gabby's Weather Machine and is using it to cheat up a storm! Now, Blaze, AJ and Gabby will have to weather Crusher's cheats to win the race and get Gabby's machine back, one and for all!

programme.title: The Rocketship Ride
programme.desc: Darington can't wait to ride the Great Rocketship Ride, the tallest, fastest carnival ride in all of Axle City! But when Darington's tickets blow away, he and Blaze must go on an epic adventure to retrieve them!

programme.title: The Crew Builds Mr. Ducky-Doo A Special Diving Board / The Crew Builds A Rainwater Tank
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble & Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble & Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: Pups Stop a Gold Finding Machine / Pups Help Mayor Humdinger Out of a Jam
programme.desc: The Paw Patrol springs into action when a digging machine goes out-of-control and takes Uncle Otis on a wild ride. // Digi and Tal, try to help Mayor Humdinger but leave the Mayor covered in jam, the Pups must rescue him from hungry animals.

programme.title: Liberty's Mountain Rescue / Pups Save a Flying Farmer Yumi
programme.desc: Liberty comes to visit the pups just in time to help save the Turbots and their radar doppler in a daring mountain rescue. // When Farmer Al builds a windmill, the wind takes Farmer Yumi and Garby on a wild flight.

programme.title: Troll Jelly / Catch That Kitty
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time. / Dora and Boots have to recover El Gatito Magico and put it in its special place so all the friends stop acting like a cat.

programme.title: The Grumple Games
programme.desc: Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: Present
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Vinny
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Daddy Puts Up a Picture
programme.desc: Daddy Pig offers to put up a picture of Peppa and George on the wall while Mummy Pig is out. He accidentally cracks the wall while doing it, so Peppa and George help Daddy Pig fix the wall before Mummy Pig comes home.

programme.title: At the Beach
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the beach, and they do lots of things there including burying Daddy Pig in the sand. When it's time to go they almost leave without Daddy Pig as he has fallen asleep.

programme.title: Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Boat
programme.desc: Peppa and George go for a ride in Grandpa Pig's boat. Danny Dog and Granddad Dog are also out sailing. Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog race their boats to see which is fastest.

programme.title: The Frog Prince / The King's Busy Day
programme.desc: Holly turns Ben into a frog. She tries to turn Ben back into an elf. Nanny Plum comes to the rescue. // Holly and King Thistle spend the day launching a boat, judging a fruit competition and making a speech at the Festival of Elf and Fairy Dancing.

programme.title: Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.title: Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Maker
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: Pups Chill Out / Pups Save Farmer Alex
programme.desc: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch. // Farmer Yumi's animals are stampeding towards town.

programme.title: Pups Save the Balloon Pups / Pups Save the Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger! // The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.desc: Peppa's family go to the museum's moon exhibition with George's friend Edmond Elephant. But Peppa thinks there are going to the real moon and is worried.

programme.title: Grandpa at the Playground
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: Goldie the Fish
programme.desc: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food, so Peppa, George and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: Fun Fair

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's daycare.

programme.desc: The pups need to rescue Ryder and Alex when they get out of control on a rocket-powered ATV.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant

programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Pups Save an Extreme Lunch

programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.desc: Ryder and the pups need to unplug Old Trusty the geyser to stop water sprouting up all over town. // Priscilla the pony gets the chance to help the Paw Patrol rescue their own vehicle after they help her out of a canyon.

programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: Chiang Rai

programme.title: Londonderry, Ireland
programme.desc: Alex visits Peace bridge and explores Ness County by visiting Mussenden temple. Later tries blow-karting.

programme.title: Levi, Finland

programme.title: Baa Atoll, Maldives
programme.desc: Kirsty Nichol pampers herself with the spa treatments, adventures and Thai cuisine offered by Dusit Thani resort on Baa Atoll in Maldives.

programme.desc: We have got the ultimate guide to India’s best white-water rafting spots, whether you’re a rookie or a river-riding pro!

programme.title: Koh Tao

programme.desc: Through Finnish activities such as foraging and reindeer herding, Emeline Nsingi Nkosi learns about Sisu - the Finnish secret to happiness.

programme.title: Bengaluru

programme.title: Lisbon, Portugal

programme.title: Chikhaldara,India
programme.desc: The mysteries and tales of Lonar Lake enthrall Krisann and Reanne.

programme.title: Dubai

programme.title: Sintra, Portugal

programme.title: Villa del Carbón, Mexico
programme.desc: From greenery and culture to spiritual power, Charlie reveals the things that make some of Mexico’s towns ‘Pueblo Magicos’.

programme.desc: From the Cliffs of Moher to the Claddagh Arts Centre, Alex Drobin encounters many natural and cultural riches along Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.desc: What happens when Krisann and Reanne encounter a hungry tigress at Tadoba National Park?

programme.title: Kungsberget Rush

programme.title: Coimbra, Portugal

programme.title: Ciudad de México, Mexico.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi explores the magnificent monuments and architecturally striking attractions of Helsinki.

programme.title: Villa del Carbón, Mexico
programme.desc: From greenery and culture to spiritual power, Charlie reveals the things that make some of Mexico’s towns ‘Pueblo Magicos’.

programme.title: Helsinki, Finland

programme.title: Tashkent, Uzbekistan
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite visits the iconic city, Tashkent, and gets firsthand experience of its culture, food and people.

programme.title: Gotland Tales

programme.title: Coimbra, Portugal

programme.title: Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to the Arctic Circle, where she meets Santa Claus in his office. She also tries midnight sun floating.

programme.title: The Sculptures of Khajuraho, India
programme.desc: The Khajuraho group of temples have awed generations with their architectural brilliance, intricate carvings and their famous erotic sculptures.

programme.title: Gothenburg Drift

programme.title: Porto, Portugal

programme.title: Bangkok

programme.title: 封口者
programme.desc: 罗雪与男友吵架后，出走来到深山民宿与伊伊成为合租室友。一晚，罗雪无意中撞破依依及其友人雷松杀死依依的前男友。为免走漏消息，他们囚禁罗雪于阁楼中。罗雪的知己苏文发现她失踪后，到处找寻她的下落。最后，罗雪及苏文能否成功逃出险境?

programme.title: 黑白潜行
programme.desc: 香港警员阿山以卧底身份潜伏在监狱，接近罪犯天哥，以获取其犯罪集团的更多证据。二人获释后，阿山全力帮助天哥扶摇直上，最终使天哥成为集团的主脑。然而，当阿山协助警方顺利摧毁犯罪集团时，他却意外揭开了天哥的一个惊天秘密...

programme.title: 凌晨两点半2
programme.desc: 依成和朋友到聚魂灵山探险，传说山中埋着千年女尸，千年不灭之阴火，进去的人都逃不出来。凌晨两点半，依成的朋友先后突然消失。在森林搜索期间，依成进入无限轮回的灵异空间，更恐怖的事情却接踵而来...

programme.title: 龙虎武师
programme.desc: 香港动作电影向来以龙虎武师的真功夫蜚声国际。这部纪录片向过去所有的龙虎武师致敬，并用上超过两年时间梳理了海量的影像资料，更采访了无数动作特技演员分享拍摄时的辛酸事迹，当中包括著名武打巨星成龙、甄子丹及洪金宝。

programme.title: 冥婚
programme.desc: 摄影师陈志成长年被一名「红衣女子」纠缠，导致多位亲人惨死；甚至连自己心仪的女孩思桐亦难逃恶运。志成欲寻找思桐惨死的真相，却揭发关于一场「冥婚」的秘密...

programme.title: 爱的世界
programme.desc: 李子良丧妻后，与两个儿子相依为命。妻子的巨额医药费令子良经济十分拮据，受同事教唆往马场孤注一掷，迫得向高利贷借款，从此子良债台高筑，疲于奔命，没有时间与儿子沟通，父子疏离。与此同时高利贷不断登门恐吓，骚扰儿子，最终弄至悲剧发生...

programme.title: 最佳女婿
programme.desc: 新潮发型屋少东 Happy 哥与死党赖布甸、龙眼仔, 因抢走上海理发店板大松客人, 与他发生口角. 一夜, 三人胡涂地与松女儿阿英醉宿一宵, 之后英意外怀孕, 不知是谁才是经手人, 惟有待孩子出世后, 以血型辨别亲父, 怎料三人皆属同一血型...

programme.title: 虚拟特攻
programme.desc: 金牌保镖龙威在妻子惨死后患上了创伤后应激障碍，心情低落。他意外结识高科技公司职员Amy，在她邀请下参加了新产品的虚拟测试。龙威测试成功后即成为该公司的虚拟特攻，更获试用新发明的防护机甲，不料遭遇神秘武装人员入侵，一场生死大战即将展开...

programme.title: 青面修罗
programme.desc: 一年轻刺客青面修罗接受人生首份刺杀任务，同时一边暗中调查当年自己家族灭门惨案幕后起因。但任务还未完成，他发现自己已经卷入了一场策划多年的阴谋当中，唯有利用自己的刺客技能，一一破局。

programme.title: 回魂夜
programme.desc: 老妇神秘堕楼死亡，鬼魂于回魂夜当晚出现作祟。弄得一众大厦保安员不得安宁，并邀请了捉鬼大师Leo与女助手相助。Leo从老妇鬼魂得知，她是被儿子及媳妇所杀害，为了让老妇安息，Leo答应将夫妇二人绳之以法...

programme.title: 霹雳先锋
programme.desc: 张铁柱是一名出色的警长，他刚烈的办案风格却遭到上司和同僚的不满。当他意外发现偷车贼伟仔为追捕持枪劫匪的关键人物，两人不得不携手将罪犯绳之以法。

programme.title: 僵尸先生
programme.desc: 茅山师父九叔受委托为富翁起棺迁葬，祈求新墓地能催财。惟富翁之尸体出现尸变后，变成僵尸，并在村内四处为害。此时，九叔的两名徒弟亦分别被僵尸所伤和受女鬼迷惑。九叔如何同时面对徒弟们生死存亡，以及僵尸为害的问题呢？

programme.title: 我爱罗兰度
programme.desc: Lolanto自命风流，一次因伤入院结识了富商的弱智独生女儿阿蚊，她如小孩般天真可爱，渐渐更与Lolanto成为好友。蚊父因此聘请Lolanto来照顾她。不久，蚊入院做智力恢复手术，但恢复智力后的阿蚊与Lolanto建立的情谊却黯然离去...

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 综艺大热门25
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。
